nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: I use the AI to deepen the lore of the world and the characters inside

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: Solo ideation limited by production constraints
nodes.grounding_span: the AI gives me some out of the box options that I wouldn't have thought of otherwise

nodes.label: AI as research assistant
nodes.label_negative: Manual technical execution without AI help
nodes.grounding_span: I also use the AI to create textures for UV maps

nodes.label: Human control over creative decisions
nodes.grounding_span: I steer the creativeness when it's something important (such as a main character)

nodes.label: AI delegation for unimportant background details
nodes.label_negative: Manual creation of all background elements
nodes.grounding_span: the AI drives the less important things, such as background objects

nodes.label: AI image generation capability
nodes.grounding_span: my only concern is what will happen if I can't use images that AI provides due to copyright

nodes.label: Market saturation from AI-generated content
nodes.grounding_span: some people may use AI to oversaturate certain markets and media making user created work less intriguing

nodes.label: Creative productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it frees up more time for creating assets as well as beefs up the quality of the work

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: The scenes and characters are all based on my descriptions

nodes.label: Market access and fair competition
nodes.grounding_span: They are filled with AI generated models that have terrible topography or are super cheap compared to user created assets

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: the AI helps me take it from good to great

nodes.label: Concern about copyright issues with AI
nodes.grounding_span: my only concern is what will happen if I can't use images that AI provides due to copyright

nodes.label: Concern about market oversaturation by AI art
nodes.grounding_span: some people may use AI to oversaturate certain markets and media making user created work less intriguing

nodes.label: Selective delegation — preserves core creative tasks for self
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I do tell the AI it has 'creative freedom' for things that aren't as important

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth ideation with AI
nodes.grounding_span: Now that I can bounce Ideas off of the AI
